discussion_comments.comment_body: Combining all of the installations into a single command causes `ResourceExhausted` errors due to excessive resource requirements. The current split is better because it works.

discussion_comments.commented_code:

     libssl-dev \
     sudo
 
+# Configuration methods for a global Rust installation

discussion_comments.comment_body: Verified the Rust installation logic. The updated script uses architecture detection (supporting both amd64 and arm64) and fixed the download path. I've also ensured that /usr/local/cargo is world-writable, allowing the non-root user to compile dependencies like pydantic-core without permission issues. Tested successfully on Docker Desktop
